services.title: Services

services.uiuxDesigner: Designing intuitive and attractive interfaces to increase user engagement.
services.contentWriter: Creating compelling content for websites, blogs, and landing pages.

about.title: About me
about.text: I am a full-stack developer with practical experience in creating modern web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express and MongoDB. I am interested in combining functionality and design to make it convenient and enjoyable for users to interact with the product. I am responsible, sociable and always eager to learn new things, quickly mastering modern technologies and approaches. I like working in a team, solving complex tasks and finding creative solutions. I have a good sense of humor, which helps maintain a friendly atmosphere during joint work.

main.p1: A developer passionate about creating innovative digital solutions.
main.p2: With little experience in web development and design, but I am ready to learn a lot of new things, as well as help bring your idea to life.
